title: To Be Merry
content:
Let's now take our time,
While we're in our prime,
And old, old age is afar off;
For the evil, evil days
Will come on apace,
Before we can be aware of.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "To Be Merry"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
